source: All-In Podcast — 2025 predictions (bestie guest Gavin Baker)
summary: Government service providers / federal contractors are the biggest business losers of 2025 due to DOGE scrutiny

Baker explicitly named Cognizant as a firm at risk from DOGE scrutiny. This is a direct, specific connection to this exact thesis.
Baker explicitly named Infosys as facing pressure from DOGE scrutiny on federal IT consulting contracts. This is a direct, specific connection to this exact thesis.
